3326310.name: worlds easiest game
3326310.description:
😼 Welcome to the game that will destroy your inner peace!

Test your patience and skills in this chaotic yet addictive experience. The rules are simple: use your mouse to navigate through increasingly challenging levels while avoiding a silly image of a cat determined to ruin your day!

🕹️ Game Highlights:

  • 8 levels of madness (for now 😉)

  • Cat-mouse intrigue

  • Simple controls, complex challenges

Basically... it’s a cool game! 😎 Are you ready to take on the chaos? Play now and see if you have what it takes to conquer all 8 levels!
